name: HA Media Request
description: Polls Gmail for media requests. Each email line becomes a checklist item in HA.

en.imap_port: IMAP server port. Gmail uses 993 for SSL.
en.imap_username: Full email address for login. Example: myaccount@gmail.com
en.imap_password: Gmail App Password (not your regular password). Example: abcd efgh ijkl mnop
en.imap_folder: Mailbox folder to monitor. Example: INBOX
en.smtp_server: SMTP server for sending replies. Example: smtp.gmail.com
en.smtp_port: SMTP server port. Gmail uses 587 for STARTTLS.
en.reply_from: From address on reply emails. Leave blank to use imap_username. Example: myaccount@gmail.com
en.send_reply_emails: Send confirmation replies to approved senders. Unapproved senders always get a Not Approved reply.
en.todo_entity_id: Entity ID of your Local To-do list. Example: todo.media_requests
en.mobile_notify_service: HA notify service for your phone. Find under Settings > Devices > Mobile App. Example: mobile_app_pixel_10_pro
en.poll_interval_seconds: How often to check for new emails, in seconds. Example: 60
en.approved_emails: Comma-separated list of allowed senders. Leave blank to accept all. Example: james@gmail.com, sarah@outlook.com
en.name_mappings: Comma-separated email=Name pairs. Unmapped senders use their email username. Example: james@gmail.com=James, sarah@outlook.com=Sarah
en.domain_replacements: Comma-separated domain=prefix pairs for SMS gateways. Normalizes the local part so 5551234567, 15551234567, and +15551234567 all match as +15551234567@domain. Example: @vzwpix.com=+1, @tmomail.net=+1
en.ignored_emails: Comma-separated list of email addresses to silently ignore. First occurrence is logged and notified, then all further emails are deleted with no reply. Example: spam@example.com, newsletters@store.com
